name: Glade Flappy Render
description: Render cyberpunk flappy avatar, pipes, score, and help overlay
code: (function(){var c=drawingContext,w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height; var f=state.flappy||{x:w*0.25,y:h*0.5,alive:true,score:0}; var pipes=state.pipes||[]; var showHelp=!!state.showHelp; c.save(); c.strokeStyle='rgba(120,255,220,0.65)'; c.lineWidth=3; for(var i=0;i<pipes.length;i++){var p=pipes[i]; c.fillStyle='rgba(15,40,30,0.95)'; c.fillRect(p.x,0,p.width,p.top); c.fillRect(p.x,p.bottom,p.width,h-p.bottom); c.strokeRect(p.x,0,p.width,p.top); c.strokeRect(p.x,p.bottom,p.width,h-p.bottom); } c.restore(); c.save(); c.translate(f.x,f.y); c.rotate(Math.max(-0.5,Math.min(0.5,f.vy*0.05))); var grad=c.createLinearGradient(-18,-10,18,16); grad.addColorStop(0,'rgba(120,255,255,0.9)'); grad.addColorStop(1,'rgba(180,80,255,0.9)'); c.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.9)'; c.beginPath(); c.ellipse(0,0,22,16,0,0,Math.PI*2); c.fill(); c.fillStyle=grad; c.beginPath(); c.moveTo(-18,-6); c.lineTo(12,-10); c.lineTo(18,0); c.lineTo(12,10); c.lineTo(-18,6); c.closePath(); c.fill(); c.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.85)'; c.beginPath(); c.arc(6,-4,4,0,Math.PI*2); c.fill(); c.fillStyle='rgba(240,255,255,0.95)'; c.beginPath(); c.arc(5,-5,2,0,Math.PI*2); c.fill(); c.restore(); c.save(); c.fillStyle='rgba(180,255,240,0.9)'; c.font='16px monospace'; c.textAlign='left'; c.fillText('SCORE '+(f.score||0),12,22); if(!f.alive){c.fillStyle='rgba(255,120,160,0.95)'; c.fillText('GAME OVER - TAP SPACE TO RESTART',12,44);} if(showHelp){c.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.78)'; c.fillRect(w*0.1,h*0.1,w*0.8,h*0.4); c.strokeStyle='rgba(120,255,220,0.85)'; c.lineWidth=2; c.strokeRect(w*0.1+2,h*0.1+2,w*0.8-4,h*0.4-4); c.fillStyle='rgba(200,255,245,0.96)'; c.textAlign='center'; c.font='18px monospace'; c.fillText('GLADE FLAPPY NIGHT RUN',w*0.5,h*0.16); c.font='14px monospace'; c.fillText('SPACE / UP ARROW  -  flap',w*0.5,h*0.20+20); c.fillText('H                  -  toggle help',w*0.5,h*0.20+40); c.fillText('ESC                -  close help',w*0.5,h*0.20+60); c.fillText('Fly between trees + ice pillars on a night slope.',w*0.5,h*0.20+90); } c.restore(); })();
